title: Vrtl Pirates Partner Plan — $299/mo billing
html:
Rankett Settings → Billing for Vrtl Pirates: Partner Plan active at $299/mo, perks listed (Unlimited analyses, Full branding logo+favicon, Remove "Powered by" badge, Custom-domain support, Priority support). No invoices yet — first billing cycle pending. Account email vqlez1718@gmail.com.

TL;DR

  • Vrtl Pirates is on the $299/mo Partner Plan — Yahir validating the billing flow on his own agency tenant.
  • Partner Plan unlocks the full ghost white label surface: custom domain, full branding, "Powered by" removal.
  • $299 sits below the GTM-bible's $998/seat headline price — likely a tier-1 partner pricing point.
